title: iria spadicea
intro: Iria spadicea, also known as the red ironweed, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues. Iria spadicea can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves and roots are often used in herbal preparations to make extracts and tinctures.
